text: AI is rapidly changing the modern workplace. One major impact is automation, where software handles repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling. This frees up employees to focus on more creative work. Meanwhile, productivity tools powered by AI help us analyze information faster and communicate more efficiently. However, AI is not replacing humans entirely. Instead, we are seeing more human-AI collaboration, where people guide AI systems and make final decisions. While some job roles will disappear, many will simply change. Workers will need to learn new skills, such as managing AI tools and interpreting their results, to stay valuable in this evolving environment.
